**Section of specification affected**
(e.g., Section 4 — Authorization Mechanism, Threat T3)

**Observation or suggestion**
A clear description of the gap, concern, or enhancement proposal.

**Supporting references (if any)**
Links to related papers, RFCs, or prior art.

**Your background (optional)**
Security researcher, engineer, academic — helps contextualize the feedback.
